change_description: RF n_estimators=200 numeric features only (Week 4 retained)
notes: Week 4 best retained model; starting point for Week 5
Tiny improvement (0.002 RMSE); duration_ms is right-skewed and benefits from compression

change_description: Add log1p(loudness+60) on top of E1
notes: Worse than E1 by 0.003; loudness shift+log adds noise rather than signal for RF
Much worse (+0.711 RMSE); those features carry real signal despite low intuitive importance

change_description: Add danceability x energy interaction term (on E1)
notes: Worse by 0.013; RF already discovers this interaction via tree splits

change_description: Add energy x loudness interaction term (on E1)
notes: Worse by 0.006; RF handles correlated-feature interactions natively

change_description: Add tempo x danceability interaction term (on E1)
notes: Worse by 0.019; manual interaction terms add noise for tree models

change_description: Add log1p(instrumentalness) to E1 feature set
notes: Best result; instrumentalness is zero-inflated and benefits from log compression

change_description: Add log1p(speechiness) and log1p(acousticness) on top of E7
notes: Worse by 0.007; over-transformation; speechiness and acousticness are less skewed

change_description: HistGradientBoostingRegressor max_iter=500 lr=0.05 max_depth=6 with E7 features
notes: Much worse (+2.733 RMSE); boosting with these params underperforms RF substantially
Worse by 0.357; restricting feature fraction per split reduces diversity benefit
Worse by 0.432; increased randomization in splits hurts on this dataset
